posts.title: DeepSeek V4 - almost on the frontier, a fraction of the price
posts.author: Simon Willison
posts.summary: Chinese AI lab DeepSeek's last model release was V3.2 (and V3.2 Speciale) last December. They just dropped the first of their hotly anticipated V4 series in the shape of two preview models,
posts.highlights: DeepSeek V4 preview models achieve near-frontier performance at a fraction of the cost, challenging the pricing strategies of leading AI labs. The release signals a major shift towards cost-efficient AI development, making advanced models more accessible.
posts.worthReading: For those tracking AI economics and model performance trade-offs, this post offers a clear analysis of how DeepSeek's pricing and capabilities compare to competitors, highlighting a potential trend in the industry.
